description: The SAP S/4HANA Sales connector provides APIs that enable seamless integration with the [Sales Inquiry - Read (A2X) API v1.0.0](https://api.sap.com/api/API_SALES_INQUIRY_SRV/overview). The service allows to read Sales Inquiries.
key-features: Read sales inquiries from SAP S/4HANA
Seamless integration with the Sales Inquiry - Read (A2X) API v1.0.0
Support for basic and OAuth 2.0 authentication
Operations for querying sales inquiry data
